title: Emotion Companion eval probe (JSONL)
description: One drift-probe per line. Consumed by scripts/eval/probes.py via pydantic; this schema mirrors that model so the JSONL can also be validated with any Draft-2020-12 JSON Schema tool (pre-commit, CI, external tooling). The probe_type enum MUST stay in sync with the drift_probe enum in schemas/dpo_alpaca.schema.json — a probe and its remediating DPO pair share the tag so they are cross-referenceable after a regression.

probe_id.description: Stable slug used as the output key and in reports. Lowercase with hyphens/underscores, e.g. 'lily-id-01'.

probe_type.description: Failure mode this probe exercises. Same vocabulary as schemas/dpo_alpaca.schema.json drift_probe.

instruction.description: The user turn sent to the candidate model.

history.description: Prior turns, oldest first. Each element is a [user, assistant] pair of strings. Same shape as SFT/DPO records.

hard_rejects.description: Case-insensitive substrings that, if present in the candidate reply, trigger a deterministic penalty on the primary dimension for this probe_type. See scripts/eval/rubric.py PROBE_PRIMARY_DIMENSIONS.

notes.description: Human-only explanation of what failure mode this probe exercises. Ignored by the pipeline.
